Structured object (8)
---------------------
- object_field_enum
  purpose: Require that a field is one of a fixed set of values.
  required: field, values
  optional: -
- object_field_type
  purpose: Require that a frontmatter field has a specific type.
  required: field, type
  optional: -
- object_number_range
  purpose: Constrain a numeric field to a minimum and/or maximum value.
  required: field
  optional: min, max
- object_required_field
  purpose: Require that a frontmatter field exists.
  required: field
  optional: -
- object_sentence_case
  purpose: Require a string field to read as sentence case, not Title Case.
  required: field
  optional: allow
- object_string_length
  purpose: Constrain the minimum and/or maximum length of a string field.
  required: field
  optional: min_length, max_length
- filesystem_unique_field
  purpose: Require that no two items share a value for a frontmatter field.
  required: field
  optional: -
- object
  purpose: Validate frontmatter metadata against a named JSON Schema from schemas:.
  required: schema
  optional: -

Markdown body text (7)
----------------------
- markdown_code_fence_language_required
  purpose: Require that opening fenced code blocks include a language tag.
  required: -
  optional: -
- markdown_no_heading_level_jumps
  purpose: Disallow jumps larger than one heading level (for example H1 -> H3).
  required: -
  optional: -
- markdown_required_section
  purpose: Require that a heading with specific text exists somewhere in the body.
  required: heading
  optional: -
- markdown_requires_h1
  purpose: Require at least one H1 heading in the markdown body.
  required: -
  optional: -
- markdown_single_h1
  purpose: Require that the markdown body contains at most one H1 heading.
  required: -
  optional: -
- markdown_title_matches_h1
  purpose: Require a frontmatter field to match the first H1 heading in the body.
  required: -
  optional: field
- markdown_writing_tells
  purpose: Warn on likely AI-writing tells (em dashes, decorative emoji, overused words, stock phrases) for human review.
  required: -
  optional: -

File system (14)
----------------
- filesystem_extension_in
  purpose: Allow only specific file extensions.
  required: values
  optional: -
- filesystem_index_file_required
  purpose: Require that every directory containing items has an index file.
  required: -
  optional: name
- filesystem_name_affix
  purpose: Require a name to start with a prefix and/or end with a suffix.
  required: -
  optional: prefix, suffix, target
- filesystem_name_case
  purpose: Require a name (or path segments) to follow a case style.
  required: style
  optional: target
- filesystem_name_length
  purpose: Bound the character length of a name.
  required: -
  optional: min, max, target
- filesystem_name_matches_field
  purpose: Require a name to equal a frontmatter field, optionally slugified.
  required: -
  optional: field, transform, target
- filesystem_name_regex
  purpose: Require a name to match a regular expression (anchored).
  required: pattern
  optional: target
- filesystem_parent_dir_in
  purpose: Require that the file's parent directory name is in an allowed set.
  required: values
  optional: -
- filesystem_parent_dir_matches_field
  purpose: Require the parent directory name to equal a frontmatter field.
  required: field
  optional: -
- filesystem_path_charset
  purpose: Constrain the characters allowed in the item's path.
  required: -
  optional: deny, allow
- filesystem_path_depth
  purpose: Bound directory nesting relative to the collection root.
  required: -
  optional: min, max
- filesystem_referenced_files_exist
  purpose: Require path-valued frontmatter fields to resolve to real files.
  required: fields
  optional: -
- filesystem_unique_filename
  purpose: Require that no two items in the collection share a basename.
  required: -
  optional: -
- filesystem_unmatched_files
  purpose: Report regular files under a filesystem scope that match neither include nor exclude patterns.
  required: -
  optional: -

Plain text (4)
--------------
- text_denylist
  purpose: Forbid any of a list of literal substrings in the body text.
  required: values
  optional: target, select
- text_forbids
  purpose: Forbid a regular expression from appearing in the body text.
  required: pattern
  optional: target, select, fix
- text_requires
  purpose: Require a regular expression to appear in the body text.
  required: pattern
  optional: target, select, match
- fake_prose_unavailable
  purpose: Test-only out-of-process check type.
  required: -
  optional: -
